title: What was big deal in episode 17
display_title: What was big deal in episode 17
wikitext:
[]: What was big deal in episode 17?             Quote Post by toe mash » Sun Oct 11, 2009 10:45 am (I couldn't find any previous thread about this using thread/google search) I never really got how come in episode 17/18 Misato (and several other characters but especially her as far as I remember..) was so afraid of telling Shinji that Toji is the new 4th child? What would/could happen that she was so afraid and worried about? I don't think Shinji would lose it if he knew a friend of his was also a fellow pilot. But Misato makes it seem like its something ultra-super dramatic I wouldn't want more of this --> sooo are there any good explanations for this ? (Maybe I'm just being thick)

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Oct 11, 2009 12:22 pm Because Shinji is the only one aware of how much piloting SUCKS. He'd be afraid for Toji, especially since the Angels have been, on the whole, getting stronger. Add to the fact that Shinji's just recently been under huge amounts of pressure and strain, and at this point HIS synch ratio is dropping, and you get a kid who isn't going to see things as "Whee I can kill shit with friends!" but a kid who is going to be all "Why? Why are you risking his life too?!" Shinji's not a good little soldier.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Oct 11, 2009 3:18 pm What Legendary said. This would basically be saying, "Hey Shinji, we're going to mentally and emotionally abuse, use, and ultimately make expendable, your friend Toji. Enjoy him while he lasts."

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Mon Oct 12, 2009 7:33 am Oh well, when you put it like that Would you say Asuka's being pissed at Shinji (not wanting to confront him in the morning, not walking with him home etc.) is because shes still annoyed at him for beating her synch at episode 16? Or she thinks he already knows about Toji and doesn't want to talk about it (she was suprised when he said he didnt know..) Thanks for your replies!

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Oct 12, 2009 9:11 am toe mash wrote: Would you say Asuka's being pissed at Shinji (not wanting to confront him in the morning, not walking with him home etc.) is because shes still annoyed at him for beating her synch at episode 16?

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Mon Oct 12, 2009 2:50 pm Oh ya, that scene. Silly little Asuka is silly.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Mon Oct 12, 2009 10:00 pm It'd be nice if all of the above was true. Eva's unique in how each character has a flow of moods from the beginning till the end of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Oct 20, 2009 11:46 pm FallenTabris wrote: It'd be nice if all of the above was true. Eva's unique in how each character has a flow of moods from the beginning till the end of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Nov 05, 2009 10:41 am Misato keeps things from Shinji. She did not inform him of the accident in Nerv's 2nd branch for example. Her stated reasons for not telling him were that he knew better than any what a burden piloting was. Presumably he would not want it placed on a friend. That said, it's all fairly secret stuff. Asuka was not even supposed to find out. Though Rei seemed to find out somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Nov 05, 2009 3:05 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Though Rei seemed to find out somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 05, 2009 5:43 pm Mr. Tines wrote: She's in Gendo's confidence so deep, I think is how we read it.

[]:             Quote Post by EVAANS » Sat Nov 14, 2009 6:17 am One of the ways I looked at the whole issue surrounding the selection of the fourth child, was that Shinji was already struggling with the general situation, and Misato didn’t want to damage one of the only areas in Shinji’s life that was even remotely stable (ie School life). Not that it really helped of course, as the real purpose behind Shinji's class and classmates was later revealed...

What would/could happen that she was so afraid and worried
